Anthropic / OpenAI SDK or MCP client

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tool calls adjudicated: allow / deny / repair / quarantine
Tool results admitted before the model reads them
Every decision counted; hash-chained journal opt-in
Provider 429s and retries absorbed
